title: write_cxxrtl crashes with assertion failure on $meminit cells with non-constant ADDR/DATA
body:
As requested:

## Steps to reproduce the issue

`yosys -p 'read_ilang ics32_ilang; write_cxxrtl -O0 sim.cpp'`

Using the following as input:
[ics32_ilang.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4751382/ics32_ilang.zip)

## Expected behavior

Outputs sim.cpp without error

## Actual behavior

```
ERROR: Assert `is_fully_const() && GetSize(chunks_) <= 1' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:3801.`
```

## Version

Yosys built from c172b30c24285faa2b57f84a2a5162c5f3dcfb4c
code_blocks: ERROR: Assert `is_fully_const() && GetSize(chunks_) <= 1' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:3801.`
